function_v0.doc: Bind the account to one secp256r1 (WebAuthn) public key (65-byte uncompressed 0x04||x||y).
function_v0.name: __constructor

udt_union_v0.doc:
Context of a single authorized call performed by an address.

Custom account contracts that implement `__check_auth` special function
receive a list of `Context` values corresponding to all the calls that
need to be authorized.
udt_union_v0.name: Context

tuple_v0.doc: Contract that has a constructor with no arguments is created.
tuple_v0.name: CreateContractHostFn

tuple_v0.doc: Contract that has a constructor with 1 or more arguments is created.
tuple_v0.name: CreateContractWithCtorHostFn

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Authorization context of a single contract call.

This struct corresponds to a `require_auth_for_args` call for an address
from `contract` function with `fn_name` name and `args` arguments.
udt_struct_v0.name: ContractContext

udt_union_v0.doc: Contract executable used for creating a new contract and used in\n`CreateContractHostFnContext`.
udt_union_v0.name: ContractExecutable

udt_struct_v0.doc: Authorization context for `create_contract` host function that creates a\nnew contract on behalf of authorizer address.
udt_struct_v0.name: CreateContractHostFnContext

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Authorization context for `create_contract` host function that creates a
new contract on behalf of authorizer address.
This is the same as `CreateContractHostFnContext`, but also has
contract constructor arguments.
udt_struct_v0.name: CreateContractWithConstructorHostFnContext

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Error types for WebAuthn verification operations.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: WebAuthnError

cases.doc: The signature payload is invalid or has incorrect format.
cases.name: SignaturePayloadInvalid

cases.doc: The client data exceeds the maximum allowed length.
cases.name: ClientDataTooLong

cases.doc: Failed to parse JSON from client data.
cases.name: JsonParseError

cases.doc: The type field in client data is not "webauthn.get".
cases.name: TypeFieldInvalid

cases.doc: The challenge in client data does not match expected value.
cases.name: ChallengeInvalid

cases.doc: The authenticator data format is invalid or too short.
cases.name: AuthDataFormatInvalid

cases.doc: The User Present (UP) bit is not set in authenticator flags.
cases.name: PresentBitNotSet

cases.doc: The User Verified (UV) bit is not set in authenticator flags.
cases.name: VerifiedBitNotSet

cases.doc: Invalid relationship between Backup Eligibility and State bits.
cases.name: BackupEligibilityAndStateNotSet

cases.doc: The provided key data does not contain a valid 65-byte public key.
cases.name: KeyDataInvalid

udt_struct_v0.doc:
WebAuthn signature data structure containing all components needed for
verification.

This structure encapsulates the signature and associated data generated
during a WebAuthn authentication ceremony.
udt_struct_v0.name: WebAuthnSigData

fields.doc: Raw authenticator data from the WebAuthn response.
fields.name: authenticator_data

fields.doc: Raw client data JSON from the WebAuthn response.
fields.name: client_data

fields.doc: The cryptographic signature (64 bytes for secp256r1).
fields.name: signature
